home.subtitle: Bitcoin on Solana
home.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to view balances and swap.

swap.title: Swap
swap.mainnetWarn: Wallet will ask for one more approval. This is a mainnet transaction.
swap.successLine: Transaction was broadcast to the network.
swap.pendingHint: May take a few seconds depending on network.

errors.sessionTerminated: Wallet session ended. Please try again.
errors.authExpired: Wallet authorization expired. Reconnect your wallet and try again.
errors.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Check SOL and input token balances.
errors.slippageExceeded: Price moved beyond your slippage tolerance. Raise slippage and retry.
errors.blockhashExpired: Transaction was rejected due to a stale blockhash. Please try again.
errors.computeBudget: Transaction is too complex (compute budget exceeded). Try again shortly.
errors.rateLimit: Jupiter API rate-limited. Please try again in a moment.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.jupiter5xx: Jupiter service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.jupiterClient: Jupiter request rejected (HTTP {{status}}). Check your inputs.
errors.generic: Transaction failed. Please try again shortly.
errors.balanceRateLimit: RPC rate limit hit. Please try again in a moment.
errors.balanceRpc4xx: Bad RPC request. Couldn't load balance.
errors.balanceAuth: RPC authentication failed. Couldn't load balance.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsDescription: We'll send a system notification when a swap succeeds.
settings.notificationsDenied: OS permission was denied. Please allow notifications in system settings.
